Profile01

Who I Am & Why It Matters

A professional whose mathematical foundation gives every analytical output a layer of precision most cannot offer — backed by Google-certified expertise in data science, ML, and AI.

"I believe that data without context is noise — the true skill of an analyst lies in translating numbers into decisions that move organisations forward."

BSc Mathematics from MGKVP Varanasi provides the quantitative foundation. 12 Google certifications — including the full Google Advanced Data Analytics Professional Certificate (7 courses) — covering ML, regression, statistics, and applied AI.

DataLensAI — Intelligent Data Analyst Agent

A fully live, AI-powered Data Analyst Agent deployed to the web. Upload any CSV dataset and instantly receive an automated analyst's full report — KPI dashboards with $89.7K revenue tracking, 43.8% profit margin analysis, AI Executive Summary, Key Findings cards, regional breakdowns, monthly trend lines, and Top-5 product rankings.
